---
title: "ssd"
generated: true
description: "Sum / mean of squared differences."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.metrics.intensity`](../nitrix-metrics-intensity.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:ssd -->
```python
ssd(moving: Float[Array, '...'], fixed: Float[Array, '...'], *, mask: Optional[Float[Array, '...']] = None, reduction: Reduction = 'mean') -> Float[Array, '...']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:ssd -->
Sum / mean of squared differences.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:ssd -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `moving` | `Float` | `...` | — | Images of identical shape. |
| `fixed` | `Float` | `...` | — | Images of identical shape. |
| `mask` | `Optional[Float[Array, '...']]` | — | `None` | Optional non-negative weight of the same shape; squared differences are weighted by it before reduction. |
| `reduction` | `Reduction` | — | `'mean'` | `"mean"` (default), `"sum"`, or `"none"` (per-voxel squared-difference map). |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `...`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen perf:ssd -->
:::: {.callout-note title="Benchmarks — nitrix-perf-bench" collapse="true"}
GPU steady-state **121.6 µs** (median, L4); up to **1841.57× faster** than `simpleitk.MeanSquares`.  [full report](https://github.com/hypercoil/nitrix-perf-bench/blob/main/reports/PERF_SSD.md)

::: {.table-responsive}
| case | platform | param | baseline | status | steady (min/med) | compile | mem | fidelity | ratio |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| ssd | jax-cuda12 | shape=[128, 128, 128] | `cupy.ssd` | ok | 71.6 µs / 75.6 µs | 61.05 ms | 16.78 MB (hbm) | ✓ 6.1e-05×tol | 0.60x vs nitrix-jax |
| ssd | jax-cuda12 | shape=[128, 128, 128] | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 119.2 µs / 121.6 µs | 230.83 ms | 50.33 MB (hbm) | ✓ 7.1e-07×tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| ssd | jax-cuda12 | shape=[128, 128, 128] | `numpy.ssd` | ok | 19.33 ms / 19.79 ms | 19.44 ms | 16.78 MB (hbm) | ✓ 0×tol | 162.10x vs nitrix-jax |
| ssd | jax-cuda12 | shape=[128, 128, 128] | `simpleitk.MeanSquares` | ok | 219.56 ms / 225.72 ms | 291.81 ms | 16.78 MB (hbm) | ✓ 2.1e-10×tol | 1841.57x vs nitrix-jax |
| ssd | jax-cuda12 | shape=[64, 64, 64] | `cupy.ssd` | ok | 70.6 µs / 74.8 µs | 1.824 s | 2.10 MB (hbm) | ✓ 4.6e-06×tol | 0.67x vs nitrix-jax |
| ssd | jax-cuda12 | shape=[64, 64, 64] | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 104.9 µs / 125.4 µs | 244.61 ms | 35.65 MB (hbm) | ✓ 4.6e-06×tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| ssd | jax-cuda12 | shape=[64, 64, 64] | `numpy.ssd` | ok | 1.94 ms / 1.95 ms | 2.08 ms | 2.10 MB (hbm) | ✓ 0×tol | 18.49x vs nitrix-jax |
| ssd | jax-cuda12 | shape=[64, 64, 64] | `simpleitk.MeanSquares` | ok | 25.26 ms / 25.62 ms | 89.29 ms | 2.10 MB (hbm) | ✓ 4.9e-11×tol | 240.82x vs nitrix-jax |
:::

*source: bench `02d1a5d9` · nitrix `a0769766`*
::::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen sections:ssd -->
::: {.callout-note}
With the default `reduction='mean'` this is the ITK
`MeanSquares` registration metric (verified bit-equal in fp64).
:::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:ssd -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
